description:
## app [1.12.8](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.7...v1.12.8) (2026-03-28)


### Bug Fixes

* Wire Morphe API (api.morphe.software) as primary patch bundle source
* Fix apps not showing on home screen (stuck loading)
* Fix failed to load patch options in settings
* Fallback chain: Morphe API → GitHub patches-bundle.json → GitHub releases
